summary: Iteration 15 regression: forgot/reset password + global /settings route + reinvite removed member + activity log dual time display. Backend pytest 8/8 PASS. Frontend verified end-to-end via Playwright: login 'Forgot password?' link present, /forgot-password page works (success state shown), /reset-password/:token route renders with all testids and rejects invalid tokens, /settings loads globally (Settings page with 6 tabs visible), Activity Log shows 'DD MMM YYYY, HH:MM' full time plus 'about X hour ago' relative time on every entry.
critical_code_review_comments: auth_routes.py forgot-password: Returns 'If the email exists...' for unknown emails but still 200 — good (prevents enumeration). However the same message is used for the success case, so callers cannot reliably surface 'email not found' — intentional; keep as-is.

auth_routes.py reset-password: No rate limiting on token submission — brute-force protection should be considered (e.g., track failed attempts per IP/email). Tokens are 36-char UUIDs so entropy is acceptable, but a simple per-IP rate limit would harden this.
auth_routes.py: 'delete-by-domain' endpoint at line 203 is unauthenticated and destructive — this is dangerous in production. Guard with admin auth or remove before prod.
team_routes.py invite: Still no auth check for 'must be team member to invite' — iteration 14 review already flagged this; intentional per code comment but worth confirming with product.

email_helper: Emails are MOCKED because no RESEND_API_KEY/SENDGRID_API_KEY is set. Reset flow works end-to-end (token in DB) but real users will NOT receive emails until an API key is added to backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 throwaway TEST_reset_* user (password-reset full cycle) and 1 TEST_reinvite_* member (invite -> remove -> reinvite -> remove). Both left in 'removed' status or as disposable user; no cleanup required for team docs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 green. Reset-password full cycle requires reading token from MongoDB password_resets collection because emails are mocked. The /settings route now works globally (not just under /boards/:id/settings). Activity log testid pattern: [data-testid^='activity-'] returns individual entries; filter out 'activity-list' and 'activity-search' non-row testids. To open Activity Log on BoardPage: click 'Activity' button (text selector works).
